[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A small, cartoon-like yellow character with large eyes sits on a bed of textured ground material at night, framed in a close-up view.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a round, yellow, character-like figure with oversized dark-brown eyes and a simple, friendly face. It wears a dark-colored garment over the lower half of its body, and a circular emblem with a spiral-like design appears on the front of the garment. The character’s head is slightly tilted and it is positioned near the center of the image, looking toward the camera.

Setting:
The background is dim and dark, suggesting nighttime or very low light. Behind the character, there is a textured surface resembling dirt or sand with scattered plant-like or straw-like pieces. A vertical, lighter strip on the right side resembles part of a post or tree trunk, while the rest of the background fades into darkness.

Visual Details:
The lighting is low and warm, casting a soft glow on the character’s yellow face and highlighting its large eyes. The ground appears uneven with small fragments and straw-like strands. The camera angle is close and slightly above ground level, with the character filling most of the frame.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a small yellow cartoon-style character with large eyes sitting on a textured outdoor ground surface. The scene is dimly lit with a dark background and a vertical light area on the right.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
